164:         ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
165:         : {};
166:     const maxRetries = parseInteger(retry.maxRetries, 2, 0, 5);

168:     const requestPayload = {
169:       provider,
170:       retry: {

172:       },
173:       validation: {

298:   const from = Number.parseInt(url.searchParams.get('from') ?? '0', 10);
299:   const limit = Number.parseInt(url.searchParams.get('limit') ?? '500', 10);
300:   const fromExclusive = Number.isFinite(from) && from > 0 ? from : 0;
301:   const boundedLimit = Number.isFinite(limit) ? Math.max(1, Math.min(limit, 1000)) : 500;
302:

307: export async function handleCancelWorkspaceDeployment(
308:   workspaceId: string,

310:   env: Env,

312: ): Promise<Response> {

319:   if (!cancelResult.deployment) {

328:       cancelResult.deployment.cancelRequestedAt

331:     }
332: 
333:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: cancelResult.deployment }, 202);
334:   }
335: 
336:   if (cancelResult.deployment.status === 'running' && cancelResult.deployment.cancelRequestedAt) {
337:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: cancelResult.deployment }, 202);
338:   }
339:

343:       code: 'deployment_not_cancellable',

677: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
678:   env: Env,
679:   workspaceId: string,
680:   deploymentId: string,
681:   maxCycles = 8
682: ): Promise<void> {
683:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
684:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
685:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
686:       return false;
687:     }
688: 
689:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
690:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
691:       return true;
692:     }
693: 
694:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
695:       return false;
696:     }
697: 
698:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
699:       workspaceId,
700:       startedAt: null,
701:       finishedAt: null,
702:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
703:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
704:     });
705:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
706:       workspaceId,
707:       deploymentId,
708:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
709:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
710:     });
711:     return true;
712:   }
713: 
714:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
715:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
716:     try {
717:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
718:     } catch (error) {
719:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
720:         try {
721:           const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
722:           if (latest?.status === 'running' && latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
723:             await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
724:             continue;
725:           }
726:         } catch {
727:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
728:         }
729:         return;
730:       }
731: 
732:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
733:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
734:         try {
735:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
736:           if (recovered) {
737:             continue;
738:           }
739:         } catch {
740:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
741:         }
742:       }
743:     }
744: 
745:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
746:     if (!latest) {
747:       return;
748:     }
749:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
750:       return;
751:     }
752:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
753:       continue;
754:     }
755:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
756:       return;
757:     }

parts.text:
I found one blocking issue in this change set.

- **High** — `fromBase64` relies on global `atob`, which is undefined in the Node runtime used by your test harness, so deployment processing falls into failure path instead of succeeding.  
  - Location: `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:106`  
  - Impact: `processWorkspaceDeployment` fails in the happy path during bundle decode; your new runner test already shows this (`expected 'succeeded', got 'failed'`).  
  - Repro signal: `node -e "console.log(typeof atob)"` returns `undefined` in this environment.  
  - Fix direction: make base64 decoding runtime-agnostic (e.g. use `Buffer.from(input, 'base64')` when `atob` is unavailable, or always use `Buffer` in Node-compatible codepaths).

I didn’t see other clear correctness blockers in the deployment API/DB/queue wiring after this pass.
